title: Speaking - Part 4
description: The examiner will ask you some questions related to the topic from Part 3. Give your opinions and discuss with your partner.

content.task: Discussion on healthcare systems and personal responsibility.

questions.question: Should individuals or governments be more responsible for people's health?
Do you think people today are generally healthier than previous generations? Why?

script.text: Should individuals or governments be more responsible for people's health?
Do you think people today are generally healthier than previous generations? Why?
Some people argue that free healthcare leads people to take less responsibility for their own health. Do you agree?
Thank you. That's the end of the speaking test.
